comment: T cell markers are present, although ribosomal genes also rank highly.
B cell receptor and MHC-II genes support B cell identity.
Myeloid and monocyte-associated genes are enriched.
Cytotoxic markers support NK or cytotoxic lymphocyte identity.
Classic inflammatory monocyte markers are enriched.
Top markers are not cell-type specific. This cluster should be treated cautiously.
MHC-II and dendritic/myeloid-related markers support dendritic cell identity.
